task: put the item in the bottom drawer
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A small blue object rests on the top surface of a brown drawer. The drawer is a rigid container with a flat top and a front-facing opening. STRATEGY - First, reach and grasp the blue object. Then, transport it to the drawer's opening. Finally, insert the object into the drawer. Failure modes include dropping the object during transport or misaligning it with the drawer's opening. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1: Reach the blue object on the drawer's surface. Step 2: Grasp the object for secure hold. Step 3: Transport it to the drawer's opening. Step 4: Insert the object into the drawer.**
Goal: inside(blue_object, drawer)
Scene: blue_object, drawer
Step 1: reach(blue_object)
  affordance_region: the top surface of the blue object
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, blue_object, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, blue_object) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(blue_object)
  affordance_region: the top surface of the blue object
  contact: holding(blue_object) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(blue_object)
Step 3: transport(blue_object -> drawer)
  affordance_region: the front-facing opening of the drawer
  spatial: above(blue_object, drawer, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(blue_object)
  done_when: above(blue_object, drawer, 0.05)
Step 4: insert(blue_object -> drawer)
  affordance_region: the front-facing opening of the drawer
  contact: inside(blue_object, drawer) [completion]
  pose: stable(blue_object) [completion]
  done_when: inside(blue_object, drawer)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the top surface of the blue object
the top surface of the blue object
the front-facing opening of the drawer
the front-facing opening of the drawer
